text: I am filled with curiosity as I step into this bright, modern space. The glass walls gently separate me from the room ahead, where vivid colors and bold letters beckon. Inside, "R + D" looms large, and the wall invites reflection on how humans and technology interact. The words I read challenge my perception—they nudge me to question my own clarity. I feel slightly disoriented, as if the boundaries between observer and observed are themselves blurred. Yet, there is excitement in this uncertainty—a sense of wonder at what knowledge or innovation might be uncovered here.
